headline: FIS Advances Cloud Banking Push Through Frankfurt International Bank Deal
summary: FIS adds Frankfurt International Bank as a cloud banking client, reinforcing its cloud-first strategy and expanding recurring revenue opportunities in digital banking.

headline: Barclays Initiates Coverage On Fidelity National Info with Equal-Weight Rating, Announces Price Target of $44
summary: Barclays  analyst Nik Cremo   initiates coverage on Fidelity National Info (NYSE:FIS) with a Equal-Weight rating and announces Price Target of $44.
